title: lepidocoryphantha runyonii
intro: Lepidocoryphantha runyonii, also known as Runyon's ball cactus, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lepidocoryphantha runyonii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of wounds. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
